info.name: House Tharashk Heir
info.description: House Tharashk Heir background from Eberron: Forge of the Artificer.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

li.i: Choose one kind of Gaming Set

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Gaming Set (same as above), Climber’s Kit, Fine Clothes, Hunting Trap, Manacles, 2 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: Heirs of other houses lead lives of luxury, but in House Tharashk you learned self-reliance from an early age. What your young house lacks in resources, it makes up for in spirit and determination. Tharashk has a destiny to fulfill, and you have a part in it. Whether in combat or in social interaction, you have learned to play the role of the hunter: study your enemies, exploit their weaknesses, and do whatever it takes to achieve victory.

setters.set: Constitution, Intelligence, Wisdom, Mark of Finding Feat, Perception and Survival Skills, One Kind of Gaming Set
